view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'Fill mode set to FCFS claim' is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence from prior steps confirms that the fill mode for the staffing demand is set to 'fcfs_claim', which directly satisfies the requirement. Specifically, the evidence from the step 'uc-need-validate-1' shows that the demand has a 'fillMode' attribute with the value 'fcfs_claim'. This indicates that the system is correctly configured to handle first-come, first-serve claims as required.
